description_long: This is a single-story brick bungalow surrounded by a low boundary wall, featuring a spacious driveway leading to a garage on one side. The structure has a mix of flat and slightly sloped roof sections, with a central white-roofed area and brown brick exterior walls. The front entrance is accentuated by a small porch, and multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The property includes a paved area and a small yard, with a car parked in the driveway. The overall design is modern with clean lines and a practical layout, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story brick bungalow with a flat and slightly sloped roof, a garage, and an asymmetrical window arrangement, surrounded by a low wall and a spacious driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, and a clear view of the brick facade and boundary wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and a car parked next to the house, with part of the yard visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, garage entrance, and the full length of the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the white-roofed section, more of the yard, and the rear portion of the boundary wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
